title: Fix presence status dots and mobile DM @ icon
description:
Three bugs reported:
1. Status dots in server/DM member list are half-clipped (overflow hidden on parent)
2. DM sidebar list (channel_list.rs) has NO presence dots on avatars at all
3. Friends grid panel has NO presence dots on avatars
4. Mobile DM header still shows avatar instead of @ symbol (previous fix incomplete)

checklist.text: Investigate: status dots are clipped in member list (overflow:hidden on parent)
Fix: overflow:visible on user-avatar parent containers (member list, DM contact panel)
Fix: Add status dots to DM list in channel_list.rs (left sidebar)
Fix: Add status dots to Friends grid in channel_list.rs
Verify: mobile DM @ icon fix is working correctly
